name: @slidecenter/agent-build
description: Build orchestrator per Live SLIDE CENTER Local Agent (Tauri v2). Non e' un'applicazione npm: esiste solo per esporre script di clean / build / post-build verso il toolchain Cargo + Tauri CLI installato globalmente.

scripts.release:full: npm run clean && npm run build:tauri && npm run post-build
scripts.release:licensed: npm run clean && npm run build:tauri:licensed && npm run post-build
